from target import is_valid_isbn10

def test_is_valid_isbn10():
    # Valid ISBN-10 with hyphens and spaces
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0-306-40615-2") is True
    # Valid ISBN-10 using X as checksum
    assert is_valid_isbn10("030640615X") is False  # checksum fails, X only allowed at last position
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0 306 40615 2") is True
    # Edge case: empty string
    assert is_valid_isbn10("") is False
    # Invalid length
    assert is_valid_isbn10("123456789") is False
    # Invalid characters
    assert is_valid_isbn10("ABCDEFGHIJ") is False
    # Valid ISBN-10 where X is correct checksum
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0306406152") is True
    # X at non‑last position should be rejected
    assert is_valid_isbn10("X306406152") is False
    # Correct checksum with X at the end
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0471958697") is True
    assert is_valid_isbn10("047195869X") is False  # wrong checksum, X not allowed here
    # Boundary: all zeros (valid checksum)
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0000000000") is True

from target import is_valid_isbn10

def test_is_valid_isbn10():
    # Valid ISBN-10 examples
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0471958697") is True
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0-321-14653-0") is True
    assert is_valid_isbn10("877195869X") is True
    # Invalid due to wrong check digit
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0471958690") is False
    # Invalid length
    assert is_valid_isbn10("123456789") is False
    # Invalid characters
    assert is_valid_isbn10("ABCDEFGHIJ") is False
    # Edge case: empty string
    assert is_valid_isbn10("") is False
    # Edge case: X in non‑final position
    assert is_valid_isbn10("X123456789") is False
    # Edge case: spaces and hyphens mixed with valid ISBN
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0 471 95869 7") is True
    # Edge case: lower‑case x should be rejected
    assert is_valid_isbn10("877195869x") is False

from target import is_valid_isbn10

def test_is_valid_isbn10():
    # Valid ISBN-10 examples
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0306406152") == True
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0-306-40615-2") == True
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0 306 40615 2") == True
    # ISBN with X as checksum
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0471958697") == True
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0-471-60695-2") == True
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0-321-14653-0") == True
    # Invalid due to wrong checksum
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0306406153") == False
    # Invalid characters
    assert is_valid_isbn10("ABCDEFGHIJ") == False
    # Edge case: empty string
    assert is_valid_isbn10("") == False
    # Edge case: length not 10 after cleaning
    assert is_valid_isbn10("123456789") == False
    # Edge case: X in non‑final position
    assert is_valid_isbn10("X123456789") == False
    # Edge case: lower‑case x in final position (should be rejected)
    assert is_valid_isbn10("123456789x") == False

from target import is_valid_isbn10

def test_is_valid_isbn10():
    # Valid ISBN-10 examples
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0306406152") == True
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0-306-40615-2") == True
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0 306 40615 2") == True
    # ISBN with X as checksum
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0471958697") == True
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0-321-14653-0") == True
    assert is_valid_isbn10("877195869X") == True
    # Invalid due to wrong checksum
    assert is_valid_isbn10("0306406153") == False
    # Invalid length
    assert is_valid_isbn10("123456789") == False
    # Invalid characters
    assert is_valid_isbn10("ABCDEFGHIJ") == False
    # Edge case: X not in last position
    assert is_valid_isbn10("X123456789") == False
    # Edge case: empty string
    assert is_valid_isbn10("") == False
